faq.question: Is the beta really free?
faq.answer: Yes! Couples Food System V2 is completely free during our Beta period. No credit card required. We just want your feedback to make the app perfect.

faq.question: Do we need two separate accounts?
faq.answer: You'll each have your own login, but they link together securely to form one Shared Kitchen. This allows for individual goal-setting while keeping planning and shopping 100% collaborative.

faq.question: What platforms are supported?
faq.answer: Couples Food System works on any device with a web browser — iPhone, Android, tablet, or desktop. No app store download needed. Just open the link and start planning.

faq.question: How long does setup take?
faq.answer: About 5 minutes. Invite your partner with a 6-digit code, set your dietary preferences and goals, and log what's in your pantry. That's it — you're ready to cook.

faq.question: What's the difference between Cook Now and I Want This?
faq.answer: Cook Now scans your pantry and shows you meals you can make right now with zero extra shopping — tap and go straight to cooking. I Want This lets you browse a visual grid of meals, filter by cuisine or cook time, and see exactly what you have vs. what you need. One tap adds missing ingredients to your shopping list.

faq.question: How does Adaptive Plating work?
faq.answer: You cook the exact same meal in one pan. At the end, our AI gives you visual plating guides — for example, suggesting Partner A takes 4oz chicken over spinach (450 cal), while Partner B takes 6oz chicken over rice (700 cal). Both plates come from the same cooking session.

faq.question: What if we have the same dietary goals?
faq.answer: Even better! The app works perfectly for couples with identical goals too. You'll still benefit from shared grocery lists, pantry-aware AI, and the collaborative planning experience.

faq.question: What if neither of us is dieting?
faq.answer: V2 handles this gracefully. If neither partner has a specific goal, the app shows equal portions with a "Same for both" label. No macro pressure, no forced dieting — just a great meal you cooked together.

faq.question: How fast is the real-time sync?
faq.answer: Changes appear on your partner's device in under 100 milliseconds. That's faster than you can blink. Add milk at the store, and it shows up on your partner's phone at home almost instantly.

faq.question: Does it work offline?
faq.answer: Yes. If you lose signal in the supermarket (we've all been there), your changes queue locally and sync automatically when you reconnect. You'll never lose data.

faq.question: Can we browse meals even if we have no groceries?
faq.answer: Absolutely. I Want This mode shows a curated recipe database of 50-100 meals regardless of your pantry. You can browse, pick something you're craving, and the app will tell you exactly what to buy.

faq.question: What is the 'Product Loop'?
faq.answer: It's the self-reinforcing cycle that makes the app smarter over time: Pantry → AI suggests meals → Shopping list for missing items → Buy groceries → Move to Pantry → repeat. In V2, you have two entry points (Cook Now and I Want This), but both feed into the same loop.

faq.question: Will it always be free?
faq.answer: During Beta, everything is free. After launch, core collaboration features (shared lists, basic planning) will remain free. Advanced AI features may become part of a premium tier — but Beta users will get special early access pricing.

faq.question: When will the app be ready?
faq.answer: We're working hard to launch soon! Join the waitlist and you'll be among the first to know when we open access. Beta users will get priority access.

faq.question: How is our data protected?
faq.answer: We take privacy seriously. Your dietary data, health goals, and personal information are encrypted and never shared with third parties. Period.

faq.question: Do you sell our data?
faq.answer: Absolutely not. We will never sell, share, or monetize your personal data. Your kitchen stays your kitchen.

faq.question: How does Couples Food System make money?
faq.answer: After Beta, we'll offer a freemium model. Core features like shared grocery lists and basic meal planning will remain free. Advanced AI features — pantry-to-meal generation, adaptive shared cooking, weekly planning — will be part of a premium tier at approximately $10/month per household (not per person).

faq.question: What's your competitive advantage?
faq.answer: Our moat is the combination of four pillars that no competitor has assembled: (1) Adaptive Shared Cooking — one meal, two plates, different macros; (2) Pantry-First AI — invert the industry standard from recipe→list to pantry→meals; (3) Relationship-First UX — built for 'we' not 'you'; (4) Real-Time Collaboration — sub-100ms sync via modern infrastructure. Together, these create a self-reinforcing product loop that's nearly impossible to replicate.

faq.question: What's the market size?
faq.answer: The relationship app market ($854M) and nutrition app market ($5.76B) together represent over $6.6B in annual consumer spending. There are 35M+ US couples in the 22-45 age range. The AI-driven meal planning segment is growing at 28% CAGR — the fastest-growing segment in the category.

faq.question: Why hasn't anyone built this before?
faq.answer: It's genuinely difficult. Adaptive shared cooking requires combining real-time collaboration, nutrition intelligence, portion mathematics, recipe generation, and relationship-aware UX into a single workflow. Most nutrition apps started as solo fitness tools and can't retrofit collaboration. Most collaboration apps lack nutrition intelligence. The complexity is the moat.
